ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "terrainRandomSeed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for terrain generation */,
  "randomSeed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for simulation */,
  "currentYear" INTEGER /* Current year of the simulation */,
  "currentDayOfYear" INTEGER /* Current day of the year in the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* A name or identifier for the simulation for better tracking and reference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the simulation ended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the simulation (e.g., 'in progress', 'completed', 'paused') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "growth_pattern" TEXT /* Growth pattern of the crop */,
  "management_requirements" TEXT /* Management requirements for the crop */,
  "species" TEXT /* The scientific name or species of the crop */,
  "optimal_temperature_range" TEXT /* The temperature range in which the crop grows best */,
  "optimal_soil_pH" TEXT /* The pH range of the soil that is optimal for the crop */,
  "water_requirements" TEXT /* The water requirements of the crop (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  "nutrient_requirements" TEXT /* The nutrient requirements of the crop (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soils" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil */,
  "soil_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Properties of the soil (e.g., pH, texture) */,
  "pH" REAL /* The pH level of the soil */,
  "texture" TEXT /* The texture of the soil (e.g., 'clay', 'sandy loam') */,
  "organic_matter_content" REAL /* The percentage of organic matter in the soil */,
  "drainage" TEXT /* The drainage capability of the soil (e.g., 'good', 'poor') */,
  "fertility" TEXT /* The fertility of the soil (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation that generated this result */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop used in the simulation */,
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil used in the simulation */,
  "precipitation_yearTotal" REAL /* Total precipitation for the year */,
  "p_soil_meanARID" REAL /* Mean ARID of the soil */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the simulation */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the simulation */,
  "p_water" REAL /* Water content of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_rootZoneDepth" REAL /* Root zone depth of the soil */,
  "p_soil_runOffCurveNumber" REAL /* Runoff curve number of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_albedo" REAL /* Albedo of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_biomass" REAL /* Biomass of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_%water" REAL /* Water content percentage of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_%crop" REAL /* Crop percentage of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_%wood" REAL /* Wood percentage of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_%brush" REAL /* Brush percentage of the soil */,
  "p_ecol_%grass" REAL /* Grass percentage of the soil */,
  "simulation_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the simulation for this result */,
  "simulation_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the simulation for this result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who ran the simulation */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the scenario being simulated */,
  "climate_model" TEXT /* The climate model used in the simulation (e.g., 'CMIP6', 'RCM') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_soil_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_id") REFERENCES soils ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_simulations" (
  "crop_simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation that generated this crop simulation */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop used in the simulation */,
  "p_crop_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the crop simulation */,
  "p_soil_meanARID_grow" REAL /* Mean ARID of the soil for the crop simulation */,
  "p_crop_yield" REAL /* Yield of the crop simulation */,
  "p_crop_totalYield" REAL /* Total yield of the crop simulation */,
  "simulation_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the crop simulation */,
  "simulation_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the crop simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who ran the crop simulation */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the crop simulation scenario */,
  "climate_model" TEXT /* The climate model used in the crop simulation (e.g., 'CMIP6', 'RCM') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_simulations_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_simulations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
